name: Extreme Excitement
vocalCue: Fast pacing, high pitch, breathless, smiling

name: Suppressed Anger
vocalCue: Slow, tight jaw, gritted teeth, heavy pauses

name: Sudden Panic
vocalCue: Erratic breathing, rushing words, darting eyes

name: Deep Sadness
vocalCue: Low pitch, slow pacing, looking down, sighing

name: Deep Suspicion / Doubt
vocalCue: Narrowed eyes, questioning tone, drawn-out words

name: Arrogant / Prideful
vocalCue: Chin up, loud, clear, dismissive tone

name: Calm and Peaceful
vocalCue: Very slow, smooth, relaxed shoulders, gentle tone

name: Nostalgic / Missing Someone
vocalCue: Soft voice, looking into the distance, slight smile

name: Desperate Guilt / Pleading
vocalCue: Shaky voice, fast explanations, eye contact
